revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-6-145

A box into which cables are led so that connections can be made to other conductors. It is usually made in such a way as to provide protective insulation and also protection from air and moisture.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Cable terminal box}}
